Footer.newsletterText: Receive weekly devotionals, updates, and ministry highlights.

HomePage.heroSubtitle: A global apostolic ministry transforming lives through the Word, discipleship, leadership, and community.
HomePage.aboutTitle: Built on the Word. Driven by Purpose.
HomePage.aboutSubtitle: Since 2020, JCIM has been raising leaders and building communities across nations through the transformative power of the Gospel.
HomePage.aboutDescription1: Jesus CITY International Ministries was born from a divine mandate to raise a generation of leaders who would transform nations. Under the apostolic leadership of Apostle Terry Paul Kwesi Yekple, JCIM has grown from a vision into a movement spanning 18+ nations.
HomePage.aboutDescription2: Through our unique Themelios Discipleship System, we take every believer on a journey from foundation to leadership — equipping them with the Word, character, and skills to impact their world.
HomePage.pillarsSubtitle: Every program, department, and initiative at JCIM is rooted in five foundational pillars.
HomePage.sermonsSubtitle: Powerful, uncompromising preaching that transforms lives and builds faith.
HomePage.eventsSubtitle: Join us for transformative gatherings, conferences, and ministry events.
HomePage.ctaSubtitle: Whether you're a new believer or a seasoned leader, JCIM has a place for you. Start your discipleship journey today.

AboutPage.heroTitle:
From a Vision
to a Movement
AboutPage.heroSubtitle: In 2020, God gave a vision to raise a CITY — a generation of leaders who would transform nations through the uncompromising Word of God.
AboutPage.timelineSubtitle: From a campus fellowship to a global ministry — every step ordered by God.
AboutPage.leadershipSubtitle: Called, equipped, and committed to building the Kingdom.
AboutPage.visionText: To raise a generation of Kingdom leaders who will transform every sphere of society through the uncompromising Word of God.
AboutPage.missionText: To disciple every believer from foundation to leadership through systematic teaching, mentorship, community, and service.

MinistriesPage.heroSubtitle: Jesus CITY International Ministry operates through seven structured departments, two community fellowships, and six specialized sub-ministries — each designed to fulfil a unique function in advancing the Kingdom. Together, they form a unified system of service, stewardship, and spiritual excellence.
MinistriesPage.departmentsSubtitle: Seven departments working in harmony to build the Kingdom.
MinistriesPage.fellowshipsSubtitle: Two vibrant community fellowships nurturing identity, purpose, and brotherhood/sisterhood in Christ.
MinistriesPage.subMinistriesSubtitle: Six focused sub-ministries extending the reach and depth of the Kingdom across every sphere.

DiscipleshipPage.heroSubtitle: A systematic, scripture-based journey that transforms every believer from new convert to kingdom leader. Named from the Greek word θεμέλιος (themelios) meaning 'foundation' — because every great work begins with a solid foundation.
DiscipleshipPage.pathwaySubtitle: A clear, structured path from new believer to mature leader.
DiscipleshipPage.foundationSubtitle: 12 essential modules that establish every believer in the fundamentals of faith.
DiscipleshipPage.cellSubtitle: The cell group system is the heartbeat of community life at Jesus CITY.

SermonsPage.heroSubtitle: Powerful, uncompromising messages from the pulpit of Jesus CITY International Ministries. Every sermon is rooted in the Word and aimed at transformation.
SermonsPage.archiveSubtitle: Browse our growing library of messages.
SermonsPage.speaker: Speaker

EventsPage.heroSubtitle: From weekly services to annual conferences, every gathering at JCIM is designed to transform lives and build community.

BereanPage.heroSubtitle: The flagship church expression of Jesus CITY International Ministries — launched in 2026 in Accra, Ghana.
BereanPage.aboutTitle: A Church That Searches the Scriptures

ConnectPage.heroSubtitle: Whether you want to join a cell group, submit a prayer request, volunteer, or just reach out — we'd love to hear from you.
ConnectPage.subject: Subject
ConnectPage.name: Full Name
ConnectPage.prayerSent: Prayer request submitted. We are praying with you!
ConnectPage.volunteerSent: Thank you for volunteering! We'll be in touch.

GivePage.heroSubtitle: Every seed sown into JCIM is an investment in the Kingdom. Your giving fuels discipleship, missions, and community transformation.

BlogPage.heroSubtitle: Articles, devotionals, and ministry updates from the heart of JCIM.

TestimoniesPage.heroSubtitle: Real stories of transformation, deliverance, and encounters with God through the ministry of JCIM.
TestimoniesPage.shareSubtitle: Has God done something amazing in your life through JCIM? We'd love to hear your story.
TestimoniesPage.submitted: Thank you! Your testimony has been submitted for review.
